controls.label: Type
controls.writes: contentEl.className=cls / replaceWith(ul|div) / tb.dataset.type / label preset style.backgroundColor,color,borderRadius
controls.note: wired in prop-text-wireup-type.js:8. bullet<->div node swap migrates content. tb.dataset.type persisted.

controls.label: 정렬 Alignment
controls.note: align.js:8. For NORMAL text, writes contentEl.style.textAlign (inline). No dataset. If serializer doesn't persist contentEl inline textAlign it reloads as left. For label writes tb.style.textAlign which is read back at prop-text.js:49 — OK. icon-text justifyContent read back prop-text.js:51 — OK.

controls.label: X position
controls.note: position.js:39. dataset.offsetX persisted; read back prop-text.js:86. parseInt||0 guard.

controls.label: Y position
controls.note: position.js:48. dataset.offsetY persisted; read back prop-text.js:87.

controls.label: 회전° Rotation
controls.note: position.js:60-76. dataset.rotation persisted/read prop-text.js:88. BUT style.transform itself is NOT in dataset — if serializer drops inline transform but keeps dataset.rotation, reload reads dataset but transform never re-applied until panel reopened. Sync pair OK. Guard clamps -180..180.

controls.label: Font
controls.writes: contentEl.style.fontFamily + contentEl.dataset.rawFont; removes child div font-family
controls.note: font.js:101-151. dataset.rawFont persisted; read prop-text.js:74. pushHistory called.

controls.label: 폰트 굵기 (weight)
controls.writes: selection: wraps in <span style=font-weight>; no selection: contentEl.style.fontWeight
controls.note: font.js:169. Mix option (value='') is disabled so safe. When user has stale _savedFwSel but range detached, extractContents on dead range could no-op silently. Partial weight lives only in span inline style — relies on innerHTML serialization.

controls.label: 폰트 크기 (size)
controls.writes: selection: <span style=font-size>; no selection: contentEl.style.fontSize (after clearing child size spans)
controls.note: text-edit.js:89-153. NO paired slider — number only. Selection-aware: if selection lost (panel click drops it) but _lastSelRange caches it via selectionchange. Risk: when block has font-size on child spans (copied block, prop-text.js:55), editing without selection wipes all child size spans then sets contentEl — could surprise-flatten Mix. Guard 8..800.

controls.label: 줄간격 Line Height
controls.note: spacing.js:9. number-only, no slider. Inline style only, NO dataset — relies on contentEl inline style serialization. Guard 1..3. No history on input, only change.

controls.label: 자간 Letter Spacing
controls.note: spacing.js:17. number-only. Inline style only, no dataset. Guard -10..40. Read back prop-text.js:65 from contentEl.style.letterSpacing — OK if inline persisted.

controls.label: 글자색 Fill
controls.writes: selection: <span style=color>; no sel: contentEl.style.color (clears child color spans)
controls.note: text-edit.js:238. selection-aware. swatch bg sync. Partial colors live in span inline — innerHTML-dependent. _buildColor merges alpha.

controls.label: Color hex
controls.note: text-edit.js:245. validated /^[0-9a-f]{6}$/i. blur resets to picker value.

controls.label: Opacity %
controls.note: text-edit.js:257. alpha stored only as part of rgba() in span/contentEl color. No separate dataset; on reload alpha is re-derived from color rgba parse prop-text.js:60-63 — OK only if color is rgba. If var-chip color picked, alpha forced 100 (text-edit.js:295).

controls.label: 컬러 변수 칩
controls.note: text-edit.js:272-302. Container starts hidden; wireColorVarChips populates.

controls.label: 그림자 켜기/끄기 Shadow
controls.note: shadow.js:111. dataset.shadow* fully persisted & read via readShadowState prop-text.js:96. Good pattern.

controls.label: Shadow X
controls.note: shadow.js:120-130. sync pair OK. clamp -20..20. dataset persisted.

controls.label: Shadow Y
controls.note: shadow.js:133-143. sync pair OK. clamp -20..20.

controls.label: Shadow Blur
controls.note: shadow.js:146-156. sync pair OK. clamp 0..40.

controls.label: Shadow 색상
controls.note: shadow.js:159-187. hex validated. alpha clamp 0..100. all in dataset.

controls.label: 너비 Size width
controls.note: position.js:6-34. dataset.width persisted; read prop-text.js:90. clamp 80..860. scheduleAutoSave.

controls.label: 상하 패딩 (top+bottom)
controls.note: padding.js:11-13. Single slider sets BOTH top&bottom. NO dataset, NO pushHistory (input only, no change handler). Inline style only on tb. Read back prop-text.js:68 currentPadT only (top). NOTE no separate change->history => undo granularity lost.

controls.label: 좌우 연동 chain
controls.note: padding.js:27-36. phLinked state is LOCAL var only — NOT persisted to dataset. On reload phLinked is recomputed from padL===padR (prop-text.js:72), so a deliberately-linked-but-equal state survives, but link INTENT when L!=R is lost. No pushHistory on chain toggle.

controls.label: 왼쪽 패딩
controls.note: padding.js:71-72. dataset.customPadL flag set. clamp 0..120. NO pushHistory (input only).

controls.label: 오른쪽 패딩
controls.note: padding.js:73-74. clamp 0..120. NO pushHistory.

controls.label: 박스 높이 (Padding section, label only)
controls.writes: contentEl.style.paddingTop/Bottom (half each) + syncs pill height controls
controls.note: label.js:84-92. Bidirectional sync with label-pill-height. clamp 0..120.

controls.label: Tag Style preset
controls.note: label.js:107-162. All inline styles, NO dataset. Circle OVERWRITES textContent to '1' destructively (label.js:147). On reload presets are not re-detectable (no data-label-preset) — only inline styles persist. radius slider synced.

controls.label: 배경색 (label)
controls.note: label.js:25-40. hex validated 6-digit. none->transparent. Inline only.

controls.label: 모서리 (label)
controls.note: label.js:46-52. sync pair OK. clamp 0..40.

controls.label: 높이 (Tag Style)
controls.note: label.js:75-83. Bidirectional 4-way sync. clamp 0..120.

controls.label: 스타일 (bubble)
controls.note: bubble.js:15-21. dataset persisted; read prop-text.js:38.

controls.label: 말꼬리 tail
controls.note: bubble.js:35-55. dataset.tail persisted; read prop-text.js:37.

controls.label: 배경색 (bubble)
controls.note: bubble.js:57-72. --bubble-bg CSS var on tb; read prop-text.js:39. hex validated.

controls.label: 발신자 이름 표시
controls.note: bubble.js:75-84. dataset persisted; read prop-text.js:42.

controls.label: 발신자 이름
controls.note: bubble.js:87-94. dataset persisted; read prop-text.js:43.

controls.label: 아이콘-텍스트 간격 (icon-text)
controls.note: align.js:30-36 (also DUPLICATE template emits same ids; wireAlignSection handles them). Inline style only, NO dataset. Read back prop-text.js:53 from tb.style.gap. NO pushHistory (input only) — undo lost. triggerAutoSave called.

controls.label: 애니메이션 GIF 만들기
controls.note: prop-text.js:131-132. onclick replaced (not addEventListener) to avoid dup.

risks: txt-size-number / txt-lh-number / txt-ls-number / txt-color-alpha are NUMBER-ONLY (no paired slider) by design — not a sync bug but inconsistent with rest of panel.
Line-height & letter-spacing written ONLY to contentEl inline style (no dataset) — silent loss if serializer normalizes/strips contentEl inline styles.
Rotation & label-shape presets persist only via inline transform/styles; dataset.rotation exists but raw transform re-application depends on save-load reapplying inline transform.
phLinked (L/R chain) intent is local-only; lost on reload when padL!=padR.
label-shape-circle DESTRUCTIVELY overwrites textContent to '1' (label.js:147) — silent content loss if user mis-clicks.
Multiple input-only handlers skip pushHistory (txt-pv, txt-pl, txt-pr, itb-gap) — undo granularity / history coverage gap, not data loss.
Normal-text alignment writes contentEl.style.textAlign (inline, no dataset) — reload integrity depends on inline serialization.

controls.label: Preset Style
controls.note: prop-label-group.js:212. If NO selectedItem the change handler returns early (line 213) — selecting a preset with no tag chosen SILENTLY does nothing (no toast/feedback). border preset value NOT written to dataset (only bg/color are) — border lost on reload.

controls.label: 전체 적용
controls.note: prop-label-group.js:232-249. border applied inline but NOT saved to dataset — reload loses border. window.DesignSystem guard but sets doc vars regardless.

controls.label: Align
controls.note: prop-label-group.js:165-172. Inline style; read back line 29. No pushHistory on align click (med-low).

controls.label: Gap
controls.note: label-group.js:177-187. sync OK. clamp 0..60. Inline only, read back line 28.

controls.label: Height (All)
controls.note: label-group.js:199-205. clamp 0..120. Inline padding only.

controls.label: 배경색 (selected tag)
controls.note: label-group.js:254-258. dataset.bg persisted; read line 35.

controls.label: 글자색 (selected tag)
controls.note: label-group.js:261-265. dataset.color persisted; read line 36.

controls.label: 모서리 (selected tag)
controls.note: label-group.js:270-282. dataset.radius persisted; read line 39. clamp 0..50.

controls.label: 높이 (selected tag)
controls.note: label-group.js:292-298. clamp 0..120. Inline padding only (no dataset, but re-derived from padding line 40-42).

controls.label: Width
controls.note: label-group.js:305-311. clamp 40..860. Inline only, read back line 25.

controls.label: X
controls.note: label-group.js:315-316. Inline only, read line 27. parseInt||0 guard.

controls.label: Y
controls.note: label-group.js:317-318. Inline only, read line 28.

risks: Preset 'border' (Outline preset 1.5px solid) is applied to element inline but NOT stored in dataset (only dataset.bg & dataset.color saved) — border silently lost on reload.
lg-style-select change with NO selectedItem returns silently (line 213) — no feedback to user.
lg-style-select & apply-all both lack any guard re-sync of the selected-tag radius/height inputs.
Align button click has no pushHistory.
